errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: This part of the page ran into an unexpected error. You can try again, or head back to your circles.

errors.saveFailed: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
errors.subscriptionRequired: Open the CircleCare app to upgrade and unlock this.
errors.permissionDenied: You don't have permission to make this change.

downloadApp.title: Get the full experience.
downloadApp.subtitle: Download CircleCare for iOS or Android.

downloadBanner.message: Get the full CircleCare experience in the app.
downloadBanner.mobileMessage: CircleCare is better in the app.

authHero.tagline: Keep your whole family coordinated — medications, appointments, and who's doing what.
authHero.imageAlt1: Family laughing together around a table
authHero.imageAlt2: Multigenerational family sharing a meal outdoors
authHero.imageAlt3: Family looking at a tablet together on the couch

gettingStarted.title: Get started
gettingStarted.subtitle: A few quick steps to set up this circle for everyone.
gettingStarted.step1Desc: Everyone on the app gets a reminder, so no dose or visit is missed.
gettingStarted.step2Desc: Share the load — they see the same schedule and updates.
gettingStarted.step3Desc: Allergies, doctors, and contacts ready the moment they're needed.
